card_description: The Dark Counterplayer is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick concludes his letter by describing the "two worlds" hidden beneath the veil (*Dokos*): the Iron Empire and the Palm Tree Garden."

linked_segments.summary: Dick concludes his letter by describing the "two worlds" hidden beneath the veil (*Dokos*): the Iron Empire and the Palm Tree Garden. He introduces the "Cosmic Game" between the Wise Mind and the Dark
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-12_Dorothy_02.txt

linked_segments.summary: Dick explores the mechanism of the "Intercessor" (Zebra/Christ) as an "orthogonal programmer" who enters the linear strip to "re-weave" situations. He argues that he was "re-programmed" in 3-74 to han
